requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport Safety Testing — UN 38.3

summary.en: All lithium cells and batteries (including BESS modules) shipped internationally must pass the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 test series (T1–T8: altitude simulation, thermal, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, forced discharge). The current edition is Rev.8 (2023) with Amendment 1 (2025) (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8). A UN 38.3 test summary or full test report must accompany each shipment. The UN number classification is UN 3480 (lithium-ion batteries, packed alone) or UN 3481 (lithium-ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment). Transport by road in Europe is governed by ADR (European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road); by sea by IMDG Code; by air by IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations. Port Koper in Slovenia is the principal EU sea entry point for this market.
summary.zh: 所有国际运输的锂电芯及电池（包括BESS模块）须通过《联合国关于危险货物运输的建议书——试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节T1–T8系列测试。现行版本为Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）。每票货物须随附UN 38.3测试摘要或完整报告。UN编号分类为UN 3480（单独包装的锂离子电池）或UN 3481（与设备一同或含于设备内的锂离子电池）。欧洲公路运输受ADR规管，海运受IMDG Code规管，空运受IATA危险品规则规管。斯洛文尼亚科佩尔港是该市场的主要欧盟海运入境港。
summary.zht: 所有國際運輸的鋰電芯及電池（包括BESS模組）須通過《聯合國關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節T1–T8系列測試。現行版本為Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）。每票貨物須隨附UN 38.3測試摘要或完整報告。UN編號分類為UN 3480（單獨包裝的鋰離子電池）或UN 3481（與設備一同或含於設備內的鋰離子電池）。歐洲公路運輸受ADR規管，海運受IMDG Code規管，空運受IATA危險品規則規管。斯洛維尼亞科佩爾港是該市場的主要歐盟海運入境港。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8 (2023) and Amendment 1 (2025))
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, 23rd revised edition — UN 3480 / UN 3481
ADR 2025 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road (Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 636, 670)
IMDG Code, Amendment 41-22 — Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 384, 636
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) 65th Edition 2024 — Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183, A201, A206

summary.en: China applies the same UN 38.3 test standard for export shipments and mirrors it in national regulations. For road transport, the standard GB 15599 (Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road) references UN 38.3. Export customs and the Ministry of Transport require a valid UN 38.3 test report and dangerous goods declaration per JT/T 617 (road) and IMDG/IATA rules for maritime/air. The Civil Aviation Administration of China (CAAC) DGR follows IATA.
summary.zh: 中国对出口货物同样适用UN 38.3测试标准，并在国内法规中予以对应。公路运输参照GB 15599（锂电池公路运输安全要求），该标准引用UN 38.3。海关及交通运输部要求持有效UN 38.3测试报告并按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA规则进行危险货物申报。中国民用航空局（CAAC）危险品规则遵循IATA。
summary.zht: 中國對出口貨物同樣適用UN 38.3測試標準，並在國內法規中予以對應。公路運輸參照GB 15599（鋰電池公路運輸安全要求），該標準引用UN 38.3。海關及交通運輸部要求持有效UN 38.3測試報告並按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA規則進行危險貨物申報。中國民用航空局（CAAC）危險品規則遵循IATA。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (adopted for export)
GB 38031-2020 — Electric vehicles traction battery safety requirements (cell-level UN 38.3 equivalent)
GB 15599 — Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road (current edition not publicly confirmable via open sources — verify via SAC or Ministry of Transport before relying on it)
JT/T 617 — Regulations for road transport of dangerous goods
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR)

gap.en: Both EU/international and China require UN 38.3 testing, so the test protocol itself is not a gap. The gaps lie in documentation and enforcement: (1) EU/ADR strictly enforces the UN 38.3 test summary requirement at the shipper level; (2) ADR 2025 introduces updated provisions on SOC ≤30% limits and packaging requirements for large-format BESS cells that may not yet be reflected in all CN factory SOPs; (3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II thresholds are strictly enforced by EU carriers; (4) EU member states including Slovenia may require additional national derogations or consignment notifications for BESS transported by road above certain energy thresholds. Multimodal shipments through Port Koper (sea + road) require re-documentation at EU port of entry to ADR.
gap.zh: 欧盟/国际与中国均要求UN 38.3测试，测试协议本身不构成差距。差距在于文件与执法：(1) 欧盟/ADR严格要求托运方层面提供UN 38.3测试摘要；(2) ADR 2025对大型BESS电芯的荷电状态（SOC≤30%）及包装要求有更新规定，可能尚未纳入所有中国工厂SOP；(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦时限值由欧洲承运人严格执行；(4) 包括斯洛文尼亚在内的欧盟成员国对超过一定能量阈值的BESS公路运输可能要求额外通知。经科佩尔港的多式联运（海运+公路）须在欧盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件。
gap.zht: 歐盟/國際與中國均要求UN 38.3測試，測試協議本身不構成差距。差距在於文件與執法：(1) 歐盟/ADR嚴格要求托運方層面提供UN 38.3測試摘要；(2) ADR 2025對大型BESS電芯的荷電狀態（SOC≤30%）及包裝要求有更新規定，可能尚未納入所有中國工廠SOP；(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦時限值由歐洲承運人嚴格執行；(4) 包括斯洛維尼亞在內的歐盟成員國對超過一定能量閾值的BESS公路運輸可能要求額外通知。經科佩爾港的多式聯運（海運+公路）須在歐盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 compliance and dangerous goods documentation are legal requirements for all international transport modes under ADR/IMDG/IATA and are enforced by carriers, freight forwarders, and customs authorities.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 test report required by customs and carriers; GB 38031-2020 mandatory for EV battery cells sold in China.

source.publisher: Agencija za energijo (Agen-E, Slovenian Energy Agency)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. A Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Slovenia must hold a valid UN 38.3 test report (T1–T8 summary) for every cell/module type, classify under UN 3480 or UN 3481, comply with ADR (road), IMDG (sea), or IATA (air) packaging and documentation requirements, and ensure SOC does not exceed 30% where required. Port Koper is the principal sea entry gateway. Engage a certified dangerous goods safety adviser (DGSA) before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国BESS出口商向斯洛文尼亚发货，须为每种电芯/模块型号持有有效UN 38.3测试报告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分类，并符合ADR（公路）、IMDG（海运）或IATA（空运）包装及文件要求，并在规定情况下确保荷电状态不超过30%。科佩尔港是主要海运入境港。首次发货前请咨询具资质的危险品安全顾问（DGSA）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國BESS出口商向斯洛維尼亞發貨，須為每種電芯/模組型號持有有效UN 38.3測試報告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分類，並符合ADR（公路）、IMDG（海運）或IATA（空運）包裝及文件要求，並在規定情況下確保荷電狀態不超過30%。科佩爾港是主要海運入境港。首次發貨前請諮詢具資質的危險品安全顧問（DGSA）。

requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Classification, Packaging & Documentation — ADR / IMDG / IATA
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品分类、包装及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品分類、包裝及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA

summary.en: Beyond UN 38.3 testing, EU/international transport law requires: (a) correct UN number (UN 3480/3481) and packing group on all shipping documents; (b) compliant outer packaging (UN-certified for full lithium batteries, or Section II packaging for consumer-type); (c) shipper's Declaration for Dangerous Goods (DGD) for air, or Dangerous Goods Transport Document for road/sea; (d) emergency response information (e.g., ERG, MSDS/SDS); (e) placarding and labelling of packages and vehicles (Class 9 hazard label, lithium battery mark). ADR Chapter 3.3 Special Provision 377 and ADR 2.2.9.1 govern large-format batteries. State-of-charge (SOC) limits apply: ≤30% for air (IATA PI 965 Section IB), and in certain ADR provisions.
summary.zh: 除UN 38.3测试外，欧盟/国际运输法规还要求：(a) 所有运输单证上注明正确UN编号（UN 3480/3481）及包装组别；(b) 合规外包装；(c) 空运须填写危险品申报单（DGD），公路/海运须填写危险品运输文件；(d) 紧急响应信息；(e) 包装及车辆须贴附标记及标签（第9类危险标签、锂电池标识）。荷电状态限值：空运须≤30%（IATA PI 965 Section IB）。
summary.zht: 除UN 38.3測試外，歐盟/國際運輸法規還要求：(a) 所有運輸單證上註明正確UN編號（UN 3480/3481）及包裝組別；(b) 合規外包裝；(c) 空運須填寫危險品申報單（DGD），公路/海運須填寫危險品運輸文件；(d) 緊急響應信息；(e) 包裝及車輛須貼附標記及標籤（第9類危險標籤、鋰電池標識）。荷電狀態限值：空運須≤30%（IATA PI 965 Section IB）。

standards_or_laws: ADR 2025 — Chapter 3.3 SP 377, SP 188, SP 230; Section 2.2.9.1; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IMDG Code Amendment 41-22 — SP 188, SP 230, SP 384; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IATA DGR 65th Edition 2024 — Packing Instructions PI 965, PI 966, PI 967; Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183
UN Model Regulations 23rd revised edition — Chapter 3.3, Chapter 6.1 packaging requirements
Regulation (EC) No 1272/2008 (CLP) — for SDS/labelling obligations where applicable

summary.en: China's export dangerous goods documentation requirements align with IMDG and IATA for sea and air freight. For road within China, JT/T 617.1-2018 and JT/T 617.4-2018 apply. Export customs (GACC) requires a dangerous goods inspection certificate for certain battery shipments. Packaging must meet GB 12463 for domestic road, or UN-certified packaging for export.
summary.zh: 中国出口危险品文件要求与海运IMDG和空运IATA保持一致。中国境内公路运输适用JT/T 617.1-2018和JT/T 617.4-2018。海关总署（GACC）对特定电池出口要求危险品检验证书。国内公路运输包装须符合GB 12463，出口须采用UN认证包装。
summary.zht: 中國出口危險品文件要求與海運IMDG和空運IATA保持一致。中國境內公路運輸適用JT/T 617.1-2018和JT/T 617.4-2018。海關總署（GACC）對特定電池出口要求危險品檢驗證書。國內公路運輸包裝須符合GB 12463，出口須採用UN認證包裝。

standards_or_laws: JT/T 617.1-2018 — Classification of dangerous goods for road transport (China)
JT/T 617.4-2018 — Packaging and labelling for dangerous goods road transport (China)
GB 12463 — General technical requirements for dangerous goods transport packaging
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR)

GACC dangerous goods inspection requirements for battery exports (exact threshold and scope subject to periodic GACC administrative announcements — verify with a licensed Chinese customs broker before shipment)

gap.en: Key gaps for a Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Slovenia via Port Koper: (1) EU ADR requires a Dangerous Goods Safety Adviser (DGSA) to be appointed by the carrier; (2) EU carriers and ports strictly enforce the Class 9 lithium battery mark on each package outer; (3) ADR 2025 and IMDG 41-22 updated special provisions for large-energy battery consignments with additional notification requirements; (4) Multimodal shipments (sea via Port Koper + road) require re-documentation at EU port of entry to ADR — a step sometimes missed by CN-origin shipments prepared only to IMDG.
gap.zh: 中国BESS出口商经科佩尔港向斯洛文尼亚发货的主要差距：(1) 欧盟ADR要求承运人任命危险品安全顾问（DGSA）；(2) 欧盟承运人和港口严格要求每件外包装贴附第9类锂电池标记；(3) ADR 2025和IMDG 41-22对大能量电池托运更新了特殊规定，增加了通知要求；(4) 经科佩尔港的多式联运（海运+公路）须在欧盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件——仅按IMDG准备的中国发货有时会遗漏此环节。
gap.zht: 中國BESS出口商經科佩爾港向斯洛維尼亞發貨的主要差距：(1) 歐盟ADR要求承運人任命危險品安全顧問（DGSA）；(2) 歐盟承運人和港口嚴格要求每件外包裝貼附第9類鋰電池標記；(3) ADR 2025和IMDG 41-22對大能量電池托運更新了特殊規定，增加了通知要求；(4) 經科佩爾港的多式聯運（海運+公路）須在歐盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件——僅按IMDG準備的中國發貨有時會遺漏此環節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ADR, IMDG, and IATA dangerous goods documentation, packaging, and labelling requirements are legally binding for all modes; non-compliance can result in shipment rejection, fines, or criminal liability.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — CAAC/IATA and IMDG rules enforced by carriers; JT/T 617 mandatory for domestic road; GACC inspection requirements apply to certain battery exports.

source.publisher: Agencija za energijo (Agen-E, Slovenian Energy Agency)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Shipping BESS from China to Slovenia requires a full dangerous goods compliance programme: UN 38.3 test summaries, correct UN number classification, UN-certified packaging, mode-specific documentation (ADR/IMDG/IATA), Class 9 labels, SOC management, and appointment of a DGSA for EU road legs. Port Koper multimodal shipments must be re-documented to ADR at the port. Engage a certified DGSA and a specialist dangerous goods freight forwarder before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。从中国向斯洛文尼亚运输BESS需建立完整的危险品合规体系：UN 38.3测试摘要、正确的UN编号分类、UN认证包装、按运输方式出具文件（ADR/IMDG/IATA）、第9类标签、荷电状态管理，以及为欧盟公路段任命DGSA。经科佩尔港的多式联运货物须在港口按ADR重新出具文件。首次发货前请聘用持证DGSA及专业危险品货代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。從中國向斯洛維尼亞運輸BESS需建立完整的危險品合規體系：UN 38.3測試摘要、正確的UN編號分類、UN認證包裝、按運輸方式出具文件（ADR/IMDG/IATA）、第9類標籤、荷電狀態管理，以及為歐盟公路段任命DGSA。經科佩爾港的多式聯運貨物須在港口按ADR重新出具文件。首次發貨前請聘用持證DGSA及專業危險品貨代。
